docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,663.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, RODRIGO REYES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $135.00 SERVED JAN-10-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, RODRIGO REYES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM TOM COHEN. APPERANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE (LUIS VILLALOBOS) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODRIGO REYES GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUIS VILLALOBOS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, RODRIGO REYES $3,663.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,798.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
